---
title: "Uncertainty_CarbonRetention_Biosolid_CA"
author: "Dr. Chih-Yu Hung"
date: "2026-04-30"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup}
# --- Packages ----
library(tidyverse)
library(future.apply)

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,
  message = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE
)
```

```{r data_and_function}
# --- Data preparation ----
# Goal: uncertainty of soil carbon retention after biosolid application.
# This analysis keeps only rows with biosolid application and the selected inventory year.

set.seed(2026)
target_year <- 2015

DF <- readRDS("Inputs/BiosolidN_corrected.rds") # Data from Chang's work

Data <- DF %>%
  filter(Inv_Year_ID == target_year) %>%
  select(
    Inv_Year_ID,
    Province_ID,
    Ecodistrict_ID,
    BION_corrected
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    CN_ratio       = 8.764367816, # Table 1: average C / average N, not average of C/N ratios.
    BCR            = 0.194,       # Biosolid carbon retention coefficient, Lin et al. 2024.
    BIOC_corrected = BION_corrected * CN_ratio
  ) %>%
  filter(BIOC_corrected > 0) %>%
  drop_na()

# --- Soil carbon retention calculation ----
# deltaC is retained biosolid carbon in soil.
# CO2e is calculated with the molecular weight ratio 44/12.
# Positive CO2e here means the amount of CO2 equivalent retained in soil.

calc_carbon <- function(df) {
  df %>%
    mutate(
      deltaC = BIOC * BCR
    ) %>%
    group_by(Province_ID) %>%
    summarise(
      Tot.Carbon = sum(BIOC, na.rm = TRUE),
      Tot.deltaC = sum(deltaC, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    )
}
```

```{r mc_settings}
# --- User knobs ----
# n_mc can be increased after testing the script with a smaller number.
# On Windows, keep workers modest to avoid memory pressure.

use_vec    <- requireNamespace("vctrs", quietly = TRUE)
n_mc       <- 5000
workers    <- 4
batch_size <- 25


# --- Random draw helpers ----
# p95 is the fractional half width of the 95 percent confidence interval.
# For example, p95 = 0.10 means mean plus or minus 10 percent as a 95 percent interval.

rnorm_ci <- function(mu, p95) {
  sd <- abs(p95) * abs(mu) / 1.96
  rnorm(length(mu), mean = mu, sd = sd)
}

rnorm_scale <- function(p95) {
  pmax(rnorm_ci(1, p95), 0)
}
```

```{r mc_worker}
# --- Core per iteration worker ----
# Each iteration perturbs biosolid N input, C/N ratio, and BCR, then recalculates soil C retention.
# BCR and C/N ratio are sampled once per MC iteration because they are model parameters.
# Biosolid N input is sampled row by row because it represents activity data uncertainty.

run_one_mc <- function(i, Data,
                       ci_list = list(
                         BIOC_corrected = 0.15,
                         CN_ratio       = 0.26,
                         BCR            = 0.50
                       )) {
  df <- Data
  message("iteration = ", i)
  
  # --- 1) Stochastic perturbation of input data and model parameters ----
  cn_scale  <- rnorm_scale(ci_list$CN_ratio)
  bcr_scale <- rnorm_scale(ci_list$BCR)
  
  df <- df %>%
    mutate(
      BIOC_corrected = pmax(rnorm_ci(BIOC_corrected, ci_list$BIOC_corrected), 0),
      CN_ratio       = CN_ratio * cn_scale,
      BCR            = BCR * bcr_scale,
      BIOC           = BION_corrected * CN_ratio
    )
  
  # --- 2) Run carbon retention calculation ----
  Result_Prov_MC <- calc_carbon(df) %>%
    mutate(MC = i)
  
  Result_Prov_MC
}

# --- Batch worker ----
# Data is serialized once per batch instead of once per MC iteration.

run_batch <- function(ii, Data) {
  acc <- NULL
  
  for (i in ii) {
    res_i <- run_one_mc(i, Data = Data)
    acc <- if (is.null(acc)) res_i else {
      if (use_vec) vctrs::vec_rbind(acc, res_i) else bind_rows(acc, res_i)
    }
    rm(res_i)
  }
  
  gc(FALSE)
  acc
}
```

```{r run_mc}
# --- Run Monte Carlo simulation ----
# The result is province level retained soil carbon for each MC iteration.

future::plan(future::multisession, workers = workers)
# options(future.globals.maxSize = 2 * 1024^3) # Uncomment if the globals are too large.

idx <- seq_len(n_mc)
batches <- split(idx, ceiling(seq_along(idx) / batch_size))

syst_s <- Sys.time()

parts <- future_lapply(
  batches,
  run_batch,
  Data = Data,
  future.seed = TRUE
)

syst_f <- Sys.time()
syst_f - syst_s

Result_Prov_MC <- if (use_vec) vctrs::vec_rbind(!!!parts) else bind_rows(parts)
rm(parts)
gc(FALSE)

summary(Result_Prov_MC) # tot.deltaC, median 1619597 mean 3032772
saveRDS(Result_Prov_MC, "Outputs/Uncertainty_Carbon_Biosolid_Province_CA.rds")
```

```{r national_summary}
# --- National uncertainty summary ----

Result_MC <- Result_Prov_MC %>%
  group_by(MC) %>%
  summarise(
    Tot.Carbon = sum(Tot.Carbon, na.rm = TRUE),
    Tot.deltaC = sum(Tot.deltaC, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    CO2e = Tot.deltaC * 44 / 12,
    `CO2e(kt)` = CO2e / 10^6
  )

summary(Result_MC) #CO2ekt 97.968, 100.081
saveRDS(Result_MC, "Outputs/Uncertainty_Carbon_Biosolid_National_CA.rds")

CI <- Result_MC %>%
  summarise(
    median = median(`CO2e(kt)`, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean   = mean(`CO2e(kt)`, na.rm = TRUE),
    lower  = quantile(`CO2e(kt)`, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE),
    upper  = quantile(`CO2e(kt)`, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE),
    rel_lower = (lower - median) / median * 100,
    rel_upper = (upper - median) / median * 100,
    rel_range = (upper - lower) / median * 100
  )

CI #-52%, 62% 
write.csv(CI, "Outputs/Uncertainty_Range_Carbon_Biosolid_CA.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r province_summary}
# --- Province level uncertainty summary ----
# This table shows the median and 95 percent uncertainty interval by province.

CI_Prov <- Result_Prov_MC %>%
  mutate(
    CO2e = Tot.deltaC * 44 / 12,
    `CO2e(kt)` = CO2e / 10^6
  ) %>%
  group_by(Province_ID) %>%
  summarise(
    median = median(`CO2e(kt)`, na.rm = TRUE),
    lower  = quantile(`CO2e(kt)`, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE),
    upper  = quantile(`CO2e(kt)`, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE),
    rel_lower = (lower - median) / median * 100,
    rel_upper = (upper - median) / median * 100,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(median))

CI_Prov #ON has the most uncertainty 17.16 - 56.97kt CO2e, relative uncertainties are all -52 and +62
saveRDS(CI_Prov, "Outputs/Uncertainty_Carbon_Biosolid_Province_CI_CA.rds")
```

```{r plot_distribution}
# --- Plot national uncertainty distribution ----
# The dashed vertical line is the median national retained soil carbon estimate.

p1 <- ggplot(Result_MC, aes(x = `CO2e(kt)`)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 40, color = "white") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = CI$median, linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(
    x = expression(CO[2]*e~"retained in soil (kt)"),
    y = "Monte Carlo count",
    title = "Uncertainty of soil carbon retention from biosolid application in Canada"
  ) +
  theme_bw()

p1

ggsave(
  "Outputs/Uncertainty_Carbon_Biosolid_CA.png",
  p1,
  width = 7,
  height = 5,
  dpi = 300
)
```
